h7e125bb5g5e8eg4580gb9e5ge7167e24c932: The goblins are gone, but so is our idol. We are exposed without it.
h0aaff742g9d7bg45bbg8ae2g49cb923b164a: We're free of the goblins, but the grove is changed. Wounded.
h5697bbc9g3875g412bg8682g0f7249e233b0: The days ahead won't be easy. I'm glad we have Halsin to guide us.
h9dafa8d7g6d8eg40d9g97b1g4c4f3c7de057: The days ahead won't be easy, but we'll manage. We have to.
h08253205g5352g44dcgb209geb513a21e712: Thanks to you, we have the chance to heal.
ha1be707fg18f9g4ee5g91edg546802d85b8a: Safe travels. You will be remembered here.
h2b7fdfc8g6594g4a94gb525gfee2befcf893: You saved a holy place from desecration. Thank you.
